disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick greasy yellow scale on reddened skin distributed over the scalp, eyebrows, creases beside the nose and mid-chest, on a background of years of mild dandruff
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the rash and what does the scale look like?
Have you had flaky skin or dandruff like this before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's greasy, yellow flaky scale on red skin - across my scalp, eyebrows, the sides of my nose and the middle of my chest. I've had mild dandruff for years but never like this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute worsening over 72 hours triggered by a period of extreme psychological stress and the onset of cold dry winter weather
trigger_question_examples: When did this flare start and was anything going on at the time?
Has anything changed recently - stress, weather?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It blew up over about three days. I'd been under huge stress and the weather turned cold and dry - that's when it exploded.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Crusting along the eyelid margins with the eyes sticking shut on waking, and burning of the lid edges (anterior lid-margin involvement)
trigger_question_examples: What are your eyelids doing exactly?
Do your eyes stick shut and where is the crusting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The edges of my eyelids get crusty and my eyes are glued shut when I wake up. The lid edges burn.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No true deep eye pain, no pain on looking at light (photophobia) and no change in vision on the patient's self-assessment
trigger_question_examples: Is there any pain inside the eye itself, or does light hurt your eyes?
Has your actual eyesight changed at all - blurring or loss of vision?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No - once I clean the crusts off, my vision seems fine. Light doesn't hurt and there's no deep pain inside the eye, it's just the crusty burning edges.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really thought about my vision, but I don't think it's changed - the trouble is the crusting on the outside.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or feeling systemically unwell, and no rapidly spreading hot swollen redness around the eye or face
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever or felt unwell in yourself?
Is the skin around your eye becoming hot, tensely swollen and spreading quickly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, I don't feel sick in myself. The area isn't hot and tight or swelling up fast - it's crusty and flaky rather than puffed up and hot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No grouped clear fluid-filled blisters and no punched-out sores or ulcers on the skin
trigger_question_examples: Are there any little clusters of clear blisters, or round punched-out sores or ulcers?
Is it flaky greasy scale, or are there weeping blistered craters?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blisters or round punched-out sores - it's greasy yellow flakes and crusts on red skin, not little clear blisters.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe psychosocial distress and low mood - housebound, unable to attend work, intense embarrassment about appearance
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting your daily life and mood?
Is it stopping you doing things like work or going out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's wrecking me - I can't face work or going outside, I feel humiliated by how I look and pretty low about it.
